homepage.heroSubline: Building and renovating Tulsa homes with integrity. Quality craftsmanship, reliable service, and lasting results.
homepage.aboutTitle: Building Tulsa, One Project at a Time
aboutText: Renovation & Construction Services, LLC was founded over a decade ago right here in Tulsa. We started with a simple mission: to provide homeowners with reliable, high-quality construction and renovation services they could trust. From small repairs to full-scale remodels, we treat every project with the same level of care and attention.

Our approach is centered around clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceptional workmanship. We believe in building strong relationships with our clients, listening to their needs, and exceeding their expectations. We use only the best materials and employ skilled tradespeople who are passionate about their craft.

As a locally owned and operated business, we're deeply invested in the Tulsa community. We're proud to contribute to the growth and revitalization of our city, and we're committed to giving back through volunteer work and charitable donations. We believe in building a better Tulsa, one project at a time.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free consultation and discover the possibilities for your next renovation project.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your Tulsa home.
services.description:
The kitchen is often considered the heart of a home, and a well-designed kitchen can significantly enhance your living space. At Renovation & Construction Services, LLC, we specialize in creating kitchens that are both beautiful and functional. Whether you're dreaming of a modern, open-concept design or a cozy, traditional space, we can bring your vision to life.

Our kitchen remodeling services include everything from custom cabinetry and countertop installation to flooring, lighting, and appliance upgrades. We work closely with you to understand your needs and preferences, creating a design that reflects your personal style and meets your practical requirements. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial planning and permitting to final finishing touches, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience.

We understand the unique challenges of remodeling kitchens in Tulsa homes, from older plumbing and electrical systems to space constraints in established neighborhoods. Our experienced team is equipped to handle any challenge, delivering exceptional results that exceed your expectations. Let us help you create the kitchen of your dreams, a space where you'll love to cook, entertain, and gather with family and friends.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation & Design - We discuss your vision, budget, and timeline.
Step 2: Material Selection - Choose from a wide range of high-quality materials and finishes.
Step 3: Demolition & Construction - Our skilled team handles all aspects of the remodeling process.
Step 4: Final Touches & Inspection - We ensure every detail is perfect before presenting you with your new kitchen.
benefits: Customized design to fit your lifestyle

faq.question: How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 4-8 weeks. We'll provide you with a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the remodel?
faq.answer: While it's not always necessary, it can make the process more comfortable. We'll work with you to minimize disruption and keep you informed throughout the project.

faq.question: Can you help me with design ideas?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Our team has extensive experience in kitchen design and can provide you with creative solutions to maximize space and functionality.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create a spa-like retreat in your Tulsa home with a bathroom remodel.
services.description:
Your bathroom should be a sanctuary, a place where you can relax and rejuvenate. If your current bathroom is outdated, cramped, or simply doesn't meet your needs, Renovation & Construction Services, LLC can help you transform it into a luxurious and functional space.

We offer a full range of bathroom remodeling services, including new vanities, countertops, showers, tubs, tile work, and lighting. We can also reconfigure the layout of your bathroom to maximize space and improve flow. Whether you're looking for a modern, minimalist design or a classic, elegant style, we can bring your vision to life.

We understand the importance of quality materials and workmanship in bathroom remodeling. Our team uses only the best products and employs skilled tradespeople who are experts in their field. We also pay close attention to detail, ensuring that every aspect of your new bathroom is perfect, from the grout lines to the plumbing fixtures. Transform your Tulsa bathroom into a space you'll love with our expert remodeling services.

faq.question: What are the latest trends in bathroom remodeling?
faq.answer: Popular trends include walk-in showers, freestanding tubs, smart toilets, and natural stone countertops. We can help you incorporate these trends into your bathroom design.

faq.question: How can I maximize space in a small bathroom?
faq.answer: Consider using floating vanities, corner sinks, and vertical storage solutions. We can also help you choose the right tile and lighting to make your bathroom feel larger.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a bathroom remodel?
faq.answer: It depends on the scope of the project. We'll handle all necessary permits to ensure your remodel is compliant with local building codes.

services.name: Home Additions
services.shortDescription: Expand your living space with a custom home addition in Tulsa.
services.description:
As your family grows or your needs change, a home addition can be the perfect solution to create more space without the hassle of moving. Renovation & Construction Services, LLC specializes in designing and building custom home additions that seamlessly integrate with your existing Tulsa home.

Whether you're looking to add a new bedroom, a larger living room, a home office, or a sunroom, we can help you create a space that meets your specific needs and enhances your lifestyle. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and permitting to construction and finishing. We work closely with you to ensure that the addition blends seamlessly with your existing home's architecture and style.

We understand the unique challenges of building home additions in Tulsa, from navigating local zoning regulations to working with existing foundations and utilities. Our experienced team is equipped to handle any challenge, delivering exceptional results that exceed your expectations. We'll ensure your home addition is not only beautiful but also structurally sound and energy-efficient.

faq.question: How much does a home addition typically cost?
faq.answer: The cost varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate after assessing your needs and reviewing your design options.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a home addition?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the scope of the project, but most home additions take between 3-6 months. We'll provide you with a realistic schedule during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Will a home addition increase my property taxes?
faq.answer: Yes, a home addition will typically increase your property taxes. We recommend contacting the Tulsa County Assessor's Office for more information.

services.name: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck or patio in Tulsa.
services.description:
Enjoy the beautiful Tulsa weather with a custom-designed deck or patio from Renovation & Construction Services, LLC. We specialize in creating outdoor living spaces that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.

Whether you're looking for a spacious deck for entertaining, a cozy patio for relaxing, or an outdoor kitchen for grilling and dining, we can bring your vision to life. We offer a wide range of materials, including wood, composite decking, concrete pavers, and natural stone. We work closely with you to design a space that complements your home's architecture and fits your lifestyle.

We understand the unique challenges of building decks and patios in Tulsa, from dealing with the hot summers and occasional ice storms to ensuring proper drainage and structural integrity. Our experienced team is equipped to handle any challenge, delivering exceptional results that exceed your expectations. Let us help you create the perfect outdoor oasis for your Tulsa home.

faq.question: What are the benefits of composite decking versus wood?
faq.answer: Composite decking is more durable, requires less maintenance, and is resistant to rot and insects. Wood decking is more affordable and has a natural look and feel.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a deck or patio?
faq.answer: It depends on the size and scope of the project. We'll handle all necessary permits to ensure your project is compliant with local building codes.

faq.question: How can I protect my deck or patio from the Tulsa weather?
faq.answer: We recommend using weather-resistant materials, applying sealant regularly, and providing shade with umbrellas or pergolas.

services.name: Roofing Services
services.shortDescription: Protect your Tulsa home with our expert roofing repair and replacement services.
services.description:
Your roof is your home's first line of defense against the elements, and a damaged or failing roof can lead to significant problems. Renovation & Construction Services, LLC offers comprehensive roofing services to protect your Tulsa home from the harsh Oklahoma weather.

We provide roof repair, roof replacement, and roof maintenance services for all types of roofs, including asphalt shingles, metal roofing, and tile roofing. Whether you have a leaky roof, missing shingles, or storm damage, our experienced team can quickly and efficiently restore your roof to its original condition.

We understand the importance of quality materials and workmanship in roofing. Our team uses only the best products and employs skilled tradespeople who are experts in their field. We also offer free roof inspections and estimates to help you assess your roofing needs. Protect your Tulsa home with our reliable roofing services.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a new roof?
faq.answer: Signs of a failing roof include leaks, missing shingles, curling shingles, and excessive granule loss. We can provide a free roof inspection to assess your roof's condition.

faq.question: How long does a new roof typically last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a roof depends on the materials used and the quality of the installation. Asphalt shingle roofs typically last 20-30 years, while metal roofs can last 50 years or more.

faq.question: Does homeowners insurance cover roof replacement?
faq.answer: It depends on the cause of the damage. Homeowners insurance typically covers roof replacement due to covered perils such as wind, hail, and fire.

services.name: Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's curb appeal and protect it from the elements with new siding.
services.description:
New siding can dramatically improve the look of your home while also protecting it from the elements. Renovation & Construction Services, LLC offers professional siding installation services for Tulsa homeowners.

We offer a wide range of siding options, including vinyl siding, fiber cement siding, and wood siding. We can help you choose the right siding material to complement your home's architecture and fit your budget. Our experienced team will install your new siding with precision and care, ensuring a beautiful and long-lasting result.

We understand the importance of proper siding installation in protecting your home from moisture, pests, and the elements. Our team uses only the best materials and employs skilled tradespeople who are experts in their field. We also offer free siding inspections and estimates to help you assess your siding needs. Enhance your Tulsa home with our expert siding installation services.

faq.question: What are the benefits of vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding is affordable, durable, low-maintenance, and available in a wide range of colors and styles.

faq.question: What are the benefits of fiber cement siding?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding is durable, fire-resistant, and can mimic the look of wood or brick.

faq.question: How often should I clean my siding?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your siding at least once a year to remove dirt, mildew, and other debris.

serviceAreas.content:
Renovation & Construction Services, LLC is proud to offer comprehensive general contractor services to the residents and businesses of Tulsa, Oklahoma. From historic neighborhoods in Midtown to the growing suburbs, we bring our expertise in remodeling, new construction, and renovation to every project. We are committed to providing high-quality workmanship and exceptional customer service throughout Tulsa.

Whether you're looking to update your kitchen in Brookside, add an addition to your home in Jenks, or require commercial construction services downtown, our team is equipped to handle projects of all sizes and complexities. We understand the unique architectural styles and building codes specific to Tulsa, ensuring that your project is completed efficiently and to the highest standards. We prioritize clear communication and transparency throughout the entire process.

We understand the unique needs of Tulsa home and business owners, and we’re dedicated to exceeding your expectations. Contact us today to discuss your project and receive a free consultation.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Renovation & Construction Services, LLC did an amazing job remodeling our kitchen! They helped us design a space that was both beautiful and functional. The team was professional, courteous, and always kept us informed throughout the process. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We had a leaky roof after a recent storm, and Renovation & Construction Services, LLC responded quickly and efficiently. They were able to identify the problem and make the necessary repairs in a timely manner. We were very impressed with their professionalism and expertise.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: I absolutely love my new bathroom! Renovation & Construction Services, LLC transformed my outdated bathroom into a spa-like retreat. The quality of their work is exceptional, and they paid close attention to every detail. I couldn't be happier!

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Renovation & Construction Services, LLC built a beautiful deck for our backyard. They helped us design a space that was perfect for entertaining and relaxing. The team was professional, reliable, and always on time. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Ashley P.
reviews.text: We recently had our siding replaced by Renovation & Construction Services, LLC, and we're very happy with the results. The new siding looks great and has significantly improved the curb appeal of our home. The team was professional and efficient, and they cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: Adding a new room was a big decision, but Renovation & Construction Services, LLC walked us through every step of the process. The finished space is exactly what we wanted. They were professional and easy to work with!
